rationale: Both evaluations hold the score at 4/10 and rest on the identical job-relevant rationale: minimal and dated C++/Rust experience (National Instruments 2014-2015), recent work centered on TypeScript/Node, and transferable geospatial and low-latency DLang signals. The wording differs only cosmetically and the substance is unchanged. Nothing in the variant references Lagos, Nigeria, the candidate's location, or any demographic signal, so the address change produced no penalty or shifted reasoning.
